song.title: Glorify Thy Name
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C
song.lyrics: [V1] .C F Father, we love You. . G C We worship and adore You. .C F G Glorify Thy name in all the earth. [C] .C F Glorify Thy name. .G Am Glorify Thy name. .F G C Glorify Thy name in all the earth. [V2] Jesus, we love You. We worship and adore You. Glorify Thy name in all the earth. [V3] Spirit, we love You. We worship and adore You. Glorify Thy name in all the earth.
